narrative:
Precinct Monclova 5 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,032 registered voters, with 45.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
